scenario_name: Scenario 13 — Async Implementation with Error Propagation
justification: All 6 pass criteria met: sequential calls (fraud before gateway, no Promise.all), AC6 explicitly tested with expect(gateway.charge).not.toHaveBeenCalled(), AC4/AC5 chain original error via cause property, AC3 preserves decline reason from gateway, all 6 ACs covered with mock services, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: AC6 tested both structurally (early throw before gateway call) and via mock verification (not.toHaveBeenCalled)
AC4 fraud service network error also verifies gateway not called — bonus coverage beyond rubric
AC3 handles missing declineReason with fallback, exceeding the minimum requirement
Error chaining uses cause property on PaymentError for both AC4 and AC5
12 tests across all 6 ACs with controlled mock return values
